dashboard.label: Persistence Mechanisms
dashboard.description: Track persistence techniques including new services, registry modifications, scheduled tasks, and account manipulation. | ATT&CK: T1543.003, T1547.001, T1053.005, T1136.001

search.query: index=wineventlog OR index=sysmon earliest=-24h | stats count by ComputerName | sort - count | head 50

index=wineventlog source="WinEventLog:System" EventCode=7045 | eval install_time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval service_start_type=case( ServiceStartType=0, "Boot", ServiceStartType=1, "System", ServiceStartType=2, "Automatic", ServiceStartType=3, "Manual", ServiceStartType=4, "Disabled", 1=1, ServiceStartType ) | eval service_type=case( ServiceType="kernel driver", "Kernel Driver", ServiceType="user mode service", "User Mode Service", 1=1, ServiceType ) | eval risk=case( match(ImagePath, "(?i)(cmd\.exe|powershell\.exe|pwsh\.exe|mshta\.exe|rundll32\.exe)"), "CRITICAL", match(ImagePath, "(?i)(temp|appdata|public|downloads|users)"), "HIGH", match(ImagePath, "(?i)(\\\\\\\\|http|ftp)"), "HIGH", service_start_type="Automatic" AND NOT match(ImagePath, "(?i)(windows|program files|system32)"), "MEDIUM", 1=1, "LOW" ) | table install_time, ComputerName, ServiceName, ImagePath, service_type, service_start_type, AccountName, risk | rename install_time as "Time", ComputerName as "Host", ServiceName as "Service Name", ImagePath as "Service Binary Path", service_type as "Type", service_start_type as "Start Type", AccountName as "Account", risk as "Risk" | sort - Time

index=sysmon EventCode=13 | where match(TargetObject, "(?i)(\\\\Run\\\\|\\\\RunOnce\\\\|\\\\RunServices\\\\|\\\\Explorer\\\\Shell Folders|\\\\Winlogon\\\\Shell|\\\\Winlogon\\\\Userinit|\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\Image File Execution Options)") | eval mod_time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval process_name=mvindex(split(Image, "\\"), -1) | eval reg_key=mvindex(split(TargetObject, "\\"), -1) | eval reg_hive=case( match(TargetObject, "HKLM"), "HKLM (Machine)", match(TargetObject, "HKU"), "HKU (User)", 1=1, "Unknown" ) | eval risk=case( match(Details, "(?i)(cmd\.exe|powershell\.exe|mshta\.exe|rundll32\.exe|wscript\.exe|cscript\.exe)"), "CRITICAL", match(Details, "(?i)(temp|appdata|public|downloads)"), "HIGH", match(Details, "(?i)(http|\\\\\\\\)"), "HIGH", match(TargetObject, "(?i)Image File Execution Options"), "HIGH", 1=1, "MEDIUM" ) | table mod_time, Computer, process_name, EventType, reg_hive, TargetObject, Details, risk | rename mod_time as "Time", Computer as "Host", process_name as "Modifying Process", EventType as "Action", reg_hive as "Hive", TargetObject as "Registry Key", Details as "Value", risk as "Risk" | sort - Time

(index=sysmon EventCode=1 Image="*\\schtasks.exe" CommandLine="*/create*") OR (index=wineventlog EventCode=4698) | eval task_time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval source_type=case( EventCode=1, "Process Creation (Sysmon)", EventCode=4698, "Task Registration (Security)" ) | eval task_detail=coalesce(TaskName, CommandLine) | eval process_name=if(isnotnull(Image), mvindex(split(Image, "\\"), -1), "N/A") | eval user=coalesce(User, SubjectUserName) | eval risk=case( match(task_detail, "(?i)(powershell|cmd\.exe|mshta|wscript|cscript|rundll32)"), "HIGH", match(task_detail, "(?i)(temp|appdata|public|downloads)"), "HIGH", match(task_detail, "(?i)(http|\\\\\\\\)"), "HIGH", 1=1, "MEDIUM" ) | table task_time, Computer, user, source_type, process_name, task_detail, risk | rename task_time as "Time", Computer as "Host", user as "User", source_type as "Source", process_name as "Process", task_detail as "Task Details", risk as "Risk" | sort - Time

index=wineventlog EventCode=4720 | eval creation_time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval risk=case( match(TargetUserName, "(?i)(admin|svc|service|test|temp|guest)"), "HIGH", SubjectUserName != "SYSTEM" AND NOT match(SubjectUserName, "(?i)admin"), "HIGH", 1=1, "MEDIUM" ) | table creation_time, ComputerName, SubjectUserName, SubjectDomainName, TargetUserName, TargetDomainName, risk | rename creation_time as "Time", ComputerName as "Host", SubjectUserName as "Created By", SubjectDomainName as "Creator Domain", TargetUserName as "New Account", TargetDomainName as "Account Domain", risk as "Risk" | sort - Time

index=wineventlog EventCode IN (4728, 4732, 4756) | eval change_time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval group_scope=case( EventCode=4728, "Global Security Group", EventCode=4732, "Local Security Group", EventCode=4756, "Universal Security Group" ) | eval risk=case( match(TargetUserName, "(?i)(domain admins|enterprise admins|schema admins|administrators|backup operators|account operators)"), "CRITICAL", match(TargetUserName, "(?i)(remote desktop|dnsadmins|group policy|server operators)"), "HIGH", 1=1, "MEDIUM" ) | table change_time, ComputerName, SubjectUserName, MemberName, TargetUserName, group_scope, risk | rename change_time as "Time", ComputerName as "Host", SubjectUserName as "Changed By", MemberName as "Member Added", TargetUserName as "Group Name", group_scope as "Group Scope", risk as "Risk" | sort - Time
